title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details
scenario: Find My Device shows last known location, device status, and battery percentage when headset is out of range
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Bluetooth headset is disconnected or out of range from the phone.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon).
4. From the menu, tap "Find My Device".
5. If prompted, grant GPS location access to the app.
6. Observe the gray geo icon displayed on the screen and tap it.
7. Note the pop-up window that appears showing the last known location details.
expected: A window opens displaying the last known location address (street & city), device name & status, date of last connection, and last known battery percentage.
